items.title: Regulated credit and insurance models
items.description: Sparse L1 logistic pipelines produce auditable lists of original application fields regulators can trace, with selection fit only on approved training cohorts.

items.title: Real-time recommendation and ranking
items.description: Filter stages drop low-variance and low-MI user signals before latency-sensitive inference, shrinking feature-store reads per request.

items.title: MLOps batch retraining jobs
items.description: Scheduled training writes a versioned Pipeline artifact (selector + model) so downstream serving systems inherit the exact column contract from each release.

items.title: Wide log and telemetry tables
items.description: Variance and MI filters on thousands of sensor or event columns reduce wrapper search space before RFECV or tree-based final models in IoT monitoring.
